Hi,
We sold well over 200 cases of these masks in just a few days, almost all of them going to the Ebay International Shipping Center in Kentucky, where Ebay does the Customs paperwork and then Ebay ships them out to you overseas. So we decided to put them all on pallets and ship them via freight truck instead of by UPS, that’s why the UPS tracking number you saw is not showing movement. They have all been shipped to Ebay to ship them over to you.
This is how Ebay has ALL USA sellers ship ALL items that are to be shipped overseas.

Can you provide me any evidence that the item has arrived eBay facility? Thank you. p.s. I just want the item and do not want to leave a negative response in ebay . "Hi, We sold well over 200 cases of these masks in just a few days, almost all of them going to the Ebay International Shipping Center in Kentucky, where Ebay does the Customs paperwork and then Ebay ships them out to you overseas. So we decided to put them all on pallets and ship them via freight truck instead of by UPS, that’s why the UPS tracking number you saw is not showing movement. They have all been shipped to Ebay to ship them over to you. This is how Ebay has ALL USA sellers ship ALL items that are to be shipped overseas."
